TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Bunun, story: bnNr-pear_Ciang

S.FORM: aiza isian sia ludun maz a munhuhuma maz a bunun.
S.TRANSL: 有一個山上的農人。
On the mountain, there is a farmer.

S.FORM: ung at adii a mabananaz a tainihuma hai.
S.TRANSL: 然後，有一個男生在那個人的田。
And then there is a boy on his fields.

S.FORM: kudadaza saia sia sinsuaz saicia izuk.
S.TRANSL: 他爬上他所種的柚子樹。
He went up to the pomelos cultivated by him.

S.FORM: a sisiza mas ung tu laas cia.
S.TRANSL: 一直採果子。
He kept on plucking the fruit.

S.FORM: ansainun saicia sia andadaan tu mahaiav mahaiav tu iahlup.
S.TRANSL: 被他放在專門裝的布袋。
He put them in the bag meant for packaging.

S.FORM: a mapunastu sia kalala cia.
S.TRANSL: 他放下在籃子裡。
He put them down in the basket.

S.FORM: at aiza maz a minuhalhal maz a sia tu izuk a hai izaun saicia.
S.TRANSL: 有那個掉下來、被他採收的柚子。
Then there are the pomelos plucked by him, dropped on the ground.

S.FORM: mahaishais a maz a pushu.
S.TRANSL: 他擦一下灰塵。
He wiped off the dust.

S.FORM: minsuma tacini sasaipuk sidi a a bunun maiskus mas a sidi anghaib.
S.TRANSL: 來了一個養羊的人，牽著羊經過。
A person who is rearing a goat passes by with it.

S.FORM: a maz a sidi a hai (COUGH) asa musuhis maun mas a izuk tu siniza sia kalala a.
S.TRANSL: 山羊想回去吃採下放在籃子裡的柚子。
The goat wants to go back to eat the pomelos that had been plucked and put inside the basket.

S.FORM: haitu iskusa s tainisidi cia mudaan.
S.TRANSL: 可是主人拉走牠。
But it is pulled away by his master.

S.FORM: aip in cin hai minsuma tacini a mabananaz a uvaaz tuntampu.
S.TRANSL: 之後，一個男生騎著腳踏車過來。
Later, a boy rides a bike over here.

S.FORM: minnasian sia avadii tu ai sin sin ai a minnasian sia kalala tu daingia s izuk cia.
S.TRANSL: 他到了放了柚子的籃子那邊。
He gets to where the baskets with pomelos are.

S.FORM: maz a maz a uvaaz a hai islunghu sakaivakaiva.
S.TRANSL: 小朋友停下來，東看西望。
The child rests and looks around.

S.FORM: sadu saia tu maz a tainiizuk a hai idadaza sia lukis cia.
S.TRANSL: 他看到柚子的主人在樹上。
He sees the tangerine guy up in the tree.

S.FORM: kaz saia miliskin tu ka minsuuz tanghaiu tu tas tu kalala mas izuk cia.
S.TRANSL: 他甚至想偷一籃的柚子。
He even thinks about stealing a basket of pomelos.

S.FORM: ung at pisialun saicia tampu at ansahanun saicia tas tu kalala izuk a mapundaza sia tampu.
S.TRANSL: 然後他弄好他的單車，把一籃子的柚子放在單車上。
Then he adjusts his bike and puts a basket of pomelos on his bike.

S.FORM: ung at paunang cia saicia tanghaiu a mudaan tundaza sia tampu cia.
S.TRANSL: 他暫且那樣偷了，騎著單車走了。
He stole it for the time being and rides his bike away.

S.FORM: mapunahtung a naia hai cibiskavan a isaicia tamuung at.
S.TRANSL: 他們互相擦撞，他的帽子飛了。
They bumped into each other roughly, and his hat was dropped off.

S.FORM: sakakiiv a saia sadu hai nii saia haiap tu aiza maz a batu itanangaus.
S.TRANSL: 他回頭看一眼，不知道前面有個石頭。
He looked back, knowing nothing about the stone ahead.

S.FORM: paptuha s tauntaun tu tanpu cia at at saia tudii hai pantunghaz mututu amin a maz a izuk.
S.TRANSL: 車輪撞上了（石頭），然後那個時候他倒了，柚子也散出來了。
The bicycle hit the stone on the wheel. Then he fell off his bike, and the pomelos were spilt out.

S.FORM: at panlanglang isaicia maz a sia bantas a.
S.TRANSL: 他的腳也撞破皮了在石頭上。
He scratched his foot.

S.FORM: at uninang aiza tatau maz a uvaaz isian sia silasdaan cia tudii sadu tu mucingkul saia hai adii a tatau uvaaz hai mindangaz.
S.TRANSL: 幸好有三個孩子那時候在路邊看到他跌倒而去幫忙。
Fortunately, three kids in the street saw him tripping over himself then. They went helping him.

S.FORM: at mindia mas izuk cia kaidusaan naicia kalala mapundaza sia tanpu cia.
S.TRANSL: 兩個人撿起柚子，一起把籃子搬上單車
Picking up pomelos, two moved the basket onto the bike.

S.FORM: at umanu s uvaaz cia batu makunasia silasdaan.
S.TRANSL: 孩子把石頭移到路邊。
The kid put the stone away the street.

S.FORM: ung at adii a uvaaz a taininghaiu s izuk a hai ’alakan saicia tampu a at pis’aika’aika upa at panmang a nadadu madahpa bantas aupa panmangmang masa mucingkul.
S.TRANSL: 腳可能很痛因為跌倒時撞得很嚴重。
He might hurt his foot because he fell roughly.

S.FORM: a kantulun mapunsian sia adii a tainiuni s tamuung cia tu tanghaiu mas izuk tu uvaaz a.
S.TRANSL: 他就跟過去把帽子還給他的主人，那個偷柚子的孩子。
He walked along and return the hat to its owner, the kid who had stolen the pomelos.

S.FORM: ung at saivan saia tu tau mas izuk cia na satatasaun naicia maun aupa tantatau naia.
S.TRANSL: 他得到三個柚子，他們要一人吃一個因為他們有三個人同行。
He got three pomelos. Each of them got one to eat because they were three walking in a row.

S.FORM: at pahusilun saicia izuk a satatasa at.
S.TRANSL: 然後他們一人分了一個。
Then they shared one for each.

S.FORM: ikdadaanun naicia maz a izuk a mamaun.
S.TRANSL: 那個柚子他們邊走邊吃。
They were walking and eating the pomelos.

S.FORM: at maz a tainiizuk a kaizuk a mabananaz a kunastu saia.
S.TRANSL: 然後那個採收柚子的人下來。
Then the tangerine harvester went down.

S.FORM: cinhuza saia tu ai mavia dusa tu kalala izuk tu kaaz kaaz in kaz.
S.TRANSL: 他嚇了一跳：為什麼一籃柚子就...
He startled: why did a basket of pomelos...

S.FORM: tautasa tu upa tau tu tau a kalala an matmuz in a dusa.
S.TRANSL: 因為三個籃子中的兩個要滿了。
Because two of these three basket ware to get full.

S.FORM: ai kaz in a na matmuz tasa uk in tasa.
S.TRANSL: 欸？那個要滿的籃子一個不見了。
What? One of the basket getting full disappeared.
